subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the One Who spoke, and hath caused all that is in the heavens and on the earth to speak
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نطق و انطق به من فی السموات و الارضین قد اتی بمظهر به خرقت الاحجاب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
